therapists.name: Dr. Aditi Sharma
therapists.bio: Dr. Sharma specializes in anxiety and depression care through collaborative CBT sessions for students, working professionals, and families across India.

therapists.name: Dr. Arjun Mehta
therapists.bio: Dr. Mehta combines mindfulness, yoga-informed stress reduction, and contemporary psychology to support resilience and emotional regulation.

therapists.name: Dr. Nisha Rao
therapists.bio: Dr. Rao works with couples, young adults, and families navigating relationship stress, emotional expression, and life transitions.

therapists.name: Dr. Kabir Menon
therapists.bio: Dr. Menon is a clinical psychiatrist focused on anxiety, sleep-wake cycles, workplace burnout, and mood stability.

feedback.message: The breathing animation is so soothing! Helps me catch my breath during panic sessions.

emergencyContacts.description: Government of India mental health support line available across states and union territories.

emergencyContacts.description: National mental health rehabilitation helpline for emotional support and guidance.

blogs.title: The Neurobiology of Diaphragmatic Breath Cycles
blogs.summary: Understand how deep, structured breathing directly cues the vagus nerve to shut off the sympathetic nervous system.
blogs.content: Diaphragmatic breathing engages the large sheet of muscle beneath your lungs. When you take deep, slow inhalations, you trigger the vagus nerve. The vagus nerve is the main line of communication for your Parasympathetic Nervous System (PNS)—the 'Rest and Digest' network.
blogs.author: Dr. Aditi Sharma
